title: lanugothamnus ochraceus
intro: Lanugothamnus ochraceus is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the yellow-flowered Rutaceae plant, native to Australia and New South Wales. This plant is said to have medicinal properties, particularly in its essential oil, which is rich in limonene and other compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lanugothamnus ochraceus include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to help alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as essential oils and extracts, can be used topically or internally, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
